title: Galangal Stew
description: A hearty and aromatic stew made with galangal, perfect for a cold winter's night. Serve with naan or rice for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the sliced galangal and cook until fragrant, 2-3 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, 5 minutes.
Add the sliced ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the garam masala and masala powder and cook for 1 minute.
Add the stew meat and cook until browned, 5-7 minutes.
Pour in the coconut milk and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, until the meat is tender, 30-40 minutes.
Season with salt and serve hot.
